name: Baked Cheese Toastwishes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Prepare shallow pan for vegetable pan-coating.
3. Toast bread on one side only.
4. Combine beaten egg, milk, salt, and paprika in a pie plate; mix well.
5. Dip bread in this mixture quickly until all is absorbed.
6. Place 2 slices toasted bread (sliced side down) in prepared pan and cover each with 1 slice cheese.
7. Place remaining 2 slices toasted bread (sliced side up) on top, then cover with remaining 2 slices cheese.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH EXCHANGES + 2 HIGH-FAT EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE. Low-sodium diets. Omit salt. Substitute low-sodium cheese.
